title: NORTH AMERICAN FINANCIAL 15 SPLIT CORP. Monthly Dividend Declaration for Class A & Preferred Share
author: Na
description: North American Financial 15 Split Corp. declared its regular monthly distribution of $0.11335 per Class A share and $0.06250 per Preferred share, payable July 10, 2026. The company invests in a diversified portfolio of 14 major North American financial services companies including Canadian banks and U.S. financial institutions.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Listed as a portfolio holding with no specific performance commentary; neutral mention as part of the investment portfolio.

title: CANADIAN LIFE COMPANIES SPLIT CORP. Declares Class A & Preferred Share Dividend
author: Na
description: Canadian Life Companies Split Corp. declared its monthly distribution of $0.10000 per Class A share and $0.05833 per Preferred share, payable July 10, 2026. The company invests in a portfolio of four major Canadian life insurance companies and has renewed its at-the-market equity program while receiving TSX acceptance for a normal course issuer bid.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned as a portfolio holding with no specific performance or news commentary provided in the article.
Mentioned as a portfolio holding with no specific performance or news commentary provided in the article.

title: Manulife Investments Announces May 2026 Cash Distributions for Manulife Exchange Traded Funds and ETF Series of Manulife Funds
author: Manulife Wealth & Asset Management
description: Manulife Investments announced May 2026 cash distributions for its exchange-traded funds and ETF series of mutual funds that distribute monthly. Unitholders of record as of May 29, 2026, will receive distributions on June 15, 2026, with distribution amounts varying across 16 different funds ranging from $0.021552 to $0.160000 per unit.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The announcement is a routine distribution notice for existing ETF and mutual fund products. It demonstrates ongoing fund management operations and regular investor payouts, which is standard business activity with no indication of positive or negative developments.

title: Manulife Financial Corporation announces Dividend Rates on Non-cumulative Rate Reset Class 1 Shares Series 3 and Non-cumulative Floating Rate Class 1 Shares Series 4
author: Manulife Financial Corporation
description: Manulife Financial Corporation announced dividend rates for its Non-cumulative Rate Reset Class 1 Shares Series 3 and Non-cumulative Floating Rate Class 1 Shares Series 4. Series 3 preferred shares will receive a fixed dividend rate of 4.64% per annum ($0.29 per share quarterly) for the five-year period starting June 20, 2026. Series 4 preferred shares will receive a floating rate dividend of 3.733% annualized ($0.23523 per share) for the three-month period starting June 20, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The announcement is a routine dividend rate declaration for preferred shares. The rates (4.64% for Series 3 and 3.733% for Series 4) are set mechanically based on Government of Canada yields plus a fixed spread, reflecting market conditions rather than company performance. This is standard corporate action with no indication of positive or negative business developments.

title: Manulife declares preferred share dividend
author: Manulife Financial Corporation
description: Manulife Financial's Board of Directors announced quarterly dividends on multiple series of non-cumulative preferred shares, payable on or after June 19, 2026 to shareholders of record on May 29, 2026. Dividend amounts vary by share class, ranging from $0.14675 to $0.396875 per share.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is maintaining its dividend payments across multiple preferred share classes, demonstrating financial stability and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. Regular dividend declarations are typically viewed positively by income-focused investors.
